title: Local karateka set for Japan
description: KNYSNA NEWS - A young karateka from Hornlee,...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - A young karateka from Hornlee, Jayson Alexander (12), has earned a spot to compete in the World Shotokan Karate Federation Championship in Japan on 22 September, where he will represent South Africa.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - A young karateka from Hornlee, Jayson Alexander (12), has earned a spot to compete in the World Shotokan Karate Federation Championship in Japan on 22 September, where he will represent South Africa."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Originally from the Northern Cape, Jayson's interest in martial arts began at a young age, according to his mother, Mauveen."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"He was always an awkward kid when it came to social interaction. But he had this deep love of martial arts. For over a year, Jayson pleaded with me to join a dojo. After relocating to Knysna in January 2022, he tried chess and rugby, but none resonated with him. That changed in February 2024 when he stepped into Apex Dojo in Knysna for his first karate session, where he instantly shined.\"","html":"\"He was always an awkward kid when it came to social interaction. But he had this deep love of martial arts. For over a year, Jayson pleaded with me to join a dojo. After relocating to Knysna in January 2022, he tried chess and rugby, but none resonated with him. That changed in February 2024 when he stepped into Apex Dojo in Knysna for his first karate session, where he instantly shined.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Road to gloryIn September 2024, Jayson competed in his first national tournament in Bloemfontein, emerging victorious and securing his place at the world championship.","html":"Road to glory
In September 2024, Jayson competed in his first national tournament in Bloemfontein, emerging victorious and securing his place at the world championship."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For a young athlete from Hornlee, representing his community on an international stage, this is a great honour.","html":"For a young athlete from Hornlee, representing his community on an international stage, this is a great honour."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"Not all kids in our community get opportunities like this. If I can be a good example, maybe it will inspire others to work hard and realise nothing is impossible, no matter where you come from,\" Jayson said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The news of his selection for the Japan championship was a dream come true. Jayson, a fan of Japanese anime, has long dreamed of visiting the country.","html":"The news of his selection for the Japan championship was a dream come true. Jayson, a fan of Japanese anime, has long dreamed of visiting the country."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity and I'm really excited about competing and experiencing Japan.\"","html":"\"This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity and I'm really excited about competing and experiencing Japan.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"TrainingJayson says he is training harder in anticipation of the championship. His schedule now includes Monday and Wednesday sessions with Knysna's elite squad, plus additional Saturday squad training.","html":"Training
Jayson says he is training harder in anticipation of the championship. His schedule now includes Monday and Wednesday sessions with Knysna's elite squad, plus additional Saturday squad training."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"The sessions are more intense now. We focus on different aspects of Shotokan, from katas to sparring, to prepare for the championship.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Despite the demanding schedule, Jayson balances his training with schoolwork, prioritising academics. \"Karate is disciplined, so school comes first. Training classes only last one hour so they don't interfere with my schoolwork,\" he says.","html":"Despite the demanding schedule, Jayson balances his training with schoolwork, prioritising academics. \"Karate is disciplined, so school comes first. Training classes only last one hour so they don't interfere with my schoolwork,\" he says."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His message to other young people in communities like Hornlee is clear:","html":"His message to other young people in communities like Hornlee is clear:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"If you're determined and disciplined, anything is possible. Stay focused and motivated\".","html":"\"If you're determined and disciplined, anything is possible. Stay focused and motivated\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Looking ahead, Jayson has his sights set on earning a black belt within five years, which, considering his talent and drive, is quite realistic.","html":"Looking ahead, Jayson has his sights set on earning a black belt within five years, which, considering his talent and drive, is quite realistic."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
